headline: Is American Tower Corporation (AMT) among the 7 Best “Land Owner” Stocks to Buy for Hard Asset Value
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 1.93%, American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) is among the 7 Best “Land Owner” Stocks to Buy for Hard Asset Value.
